texto: Britain isn't a world power any more. Its just like a zombie in that regard
autor: it doesn't know when it's dead - Samson from No Boundaries.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it doesn't know when it's dead - Samson from No Boundaries.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Britain isn't a world power any more. Its just like a zombie in that regard” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, paul-xavier-jones, britain pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
